metadata.description: Blender magic texture - complex proprietary algorithm

summary: Blender's 'magic' procedural texture generates complex color patterns. Difficult to replicate exactly.
algorithm: Proprietary Blender algorithm combining sine/cosine with various transforms
implementation: Approximation using sin/cos combinations and color interpolation
complexity: Very High - exact algorithm not well-documented
compatibility_loss_60_percent: Can only approximate - exact algorithm proprietary to Blender
alternative: Use other noise textures (Noise, Voronoi, Wave) as substitutes
